title: WITHINGS Body Scan - Connected WiFi Scale to Improve Your Health, BIA Personal Scale, Body Composition Analysis, Body Fat, Muscle Mass, Water Percentage, Electrocardiogram, Black
features: A clinical scan of your health - Body Scan has been developed in collaboration with leading hospitals and clinical facilities and is clinically validated.
Build muscle mass faster – locate precise muscular imbalances and excess fat in the arms, legs and core with the handle of the scale.
Recognise a heart anomaly – detect possible signs of atrial fibrillation, the most common form of cardiac arrhythmias, with the electrocardiogram.
Detect early signs of diabetes-related complications – Monitor your nerve health in the long term to detect peripheral autonomic neuropathies, one of the long-term complications of diabetes.

Estimate your cardiovascular risk – Analyze the condition of your arteries every day with a revolutionary assessment that measures arterial stiffness, an important factor that can lead to high blood pressure.
